protein_name: Nuclease that induces DNA fragmentation and chromatin condensation during apoptosis. Degrades naked DNA and induces apoptotic morphology. 4 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Cellular Component: chromatin; cytoplasm; cytosol; nucleolus; nucleoplasm; nucleus; protein-containing complex
raw_fields.Molecular Function: DNA binding; DNA endonuclease activity; DNA nuclease activity; enzyme binding; hydrolase activity; identical protein binding; nuclease activity; protein binding
raw_fields.Biological Process: apoptotic chromosome condensation; apoptotic DNA fragmentation; apoptotic process; DNA catabolic process; negative regulation of apoptotic DNA fragmentation
